_publications._publicationTitle: Epigenetic reprogramming shapes the cellular landscape of schwannoma.

_contextSnippet: CRISPRi suppression of NF2 in HEI-193 cells stably expressing dCas9-KRAB promoted cell proliferation compared to HEI-193 cells expressing non-targeted control sgRNAs
